title: Async Video Interviewing
text:
# Async Video Interviewing

## Screen at Scale. Signal at Speed.

Stop scheduling chaos and interview screening that isn't predictive. Async Video Interview lets every candidate record their best answers on their own time, and gives your team the structured talent signal to make faster, fairer shortlisting decisions.

Book a Demo 
 

Criteria platform

Criteria platform mobile

75%

faster shortlisting vs. phone screens

2x

more predictive than unstructured interviews

80%

of candidates prefer video interviews

**WHY ASYNC VIDEO INTERVIEW**

## A better signal from every candidate

Async Video Interview gives you a structured, scalable way to see the real person behind the application.

##### End the scheduling chaos

No more back-and-forth calendar acrobatics. Candidates record on their schedule. You review when it suits yours. The result is 75% faster shortlisting.

##### Structured signal every time

Every candidate answers the same questions in the same format. That consistency is what makes video interviews 2x more predictive than unstructured phone screens.

##### Built-in fairness

Blind review mode, consistent rubrics, and independent evaluations minimize unconscious bias and give every candidate an equal opportunity to shine.

##### No barriers to apply

Time zones, geography, and work schedules stop mattering. Candidates complete interviews from anywhere, on any device, in any language.

**HOW IT WORKS**

## From invite to shortlist in four steps 

Everything lives inside the Criteria platform. No new logins. No extra tools.

1. 

#### **1.** Build

Choose from a library of validated, job-relevant questions and stock videos or record your own. Add a custom welcome video to showcase your brand.

step 2 icon

#### **2.** Invite

Send candidates a link directly from the Criteria platform or your ATS. They complete the interview anytime, anywhere, on any device.

step 3 icon

#### **3.** Evaluate

Reviewers score responses independently or enable AI scoring using structured rubrics, eliminating groupthink and anchoring bias from the process.

step 4 icon

#### **4.** Decide

All scores compile automatically. Compare candidates side by side alongside assessment results and make data-driven shortlisting decisions.

**SAVE TIME**

## Get time back with every candidate

Reclaim the endless hours spent scheduling phone screens, taking notes, and chasing evaluators for feedback summaries. With Async Video Interview, evaluation is built into the flow, not bolted on afterward. 

**Teams using Criteria report saving 15 minutes of recruiter time for every single candidate screened.**

candidate interview rating evaluation

woman answering video interview question

**CANDIDATE EXPERIENCE**

## Spark candidate joy

Candidates get a professional, branded experience that feels fair. They record on their terms. No awkward cold calls, no time zone stress. The result is a stronger employer brand and fewer early-stage drop-offs.

**80% of candidates prefer the convenience of video interviews over traditional phone screens.**

**INCLUSIVE HIRING**

## Fairness built into every evaluation

Independent review prevents evaluators from influencing each other. Blind review mode hides candidate identifiers so first impressions stay data-driven. Consistent questions mean every candidate is measured against the same bar. 
Structured async interviews reduce bias and improve equitable hiring outcomes across diverse candidate pools.

video interview with candidate information hidden

globe with candidates from around the world

**INTEGRATED DECISIONS**

## One place for every talent signal

Async Video Interview scores sit alongside assessment results, AI scoring results, and Real-Time Interview evaluations in the Criteria platform. Compare candidates holistically. No tab-switching, no spreadsheet archaeology.

**The full Talent Signal picture in one view: Potential, Skills, and Performance signals for every candidate.**

**THE TALENT SIGNAL PLATFORM**

## Uncover skills that get lost in traditional screening methods. 

Criteria measures what actually predicts success, across three signal types: potential, skills, and performance. Async Video Interview is a core tool for capturing the proof of job readiness that resumes can't provide.

**POTENTIAL SIGNAL**

#### Who they can become

Cognitive aptitude, personality, emotional intelligence, and risk indicators that predict long-term trajectory.

✔ Cognitive Aptitude 
✔ Personality 
✔ Emotional Intelligence

**SKILLS SIGNALS**

#### What they can do today 

Job-relevant skills, simulations, and structured interview responses that verify real-world capability before any live conversation. 

**✔ Async Video Interview** 
✔ AI Interview Agent  
✔ Skills Assessments

**PERFORMANCE SIGNAL**

#### How they grow over time

Post-hire engagement, team dynamics, and coachability data that surfaces potential already inside your organization.

✔ Manager Check-ins 
✔ TEAMscan 
✔ Coach Bo

 
**CASE STUDY — Rocky Bay**

## "We cut our time-to-hire in half and saved $180k in recruiting costs, without sacrificing quality of hire."

Read the full case study

**✧ AI-SCORING ADD-ON**

## Shortlisting time: zero

Pair Async Video Interview with AI-scored responses that are as accurate as an expert grader. Your shortlist builds itself. 
 

Learn More

**✧** Instant AI scoring as accurate as an expert human grader 

**✧** Trained on 20 years of Criteria I/O psychology data 

**✧** AI-assisted question selection for maximum validity 

**✧** Auto-generated evaluation guides and BARS rubrics 

**✧** Automatic scoring with humans deciding next steps

**THE PREDICTIVE INTERVIEWING SUITE**

## Every interview, covered 

Mix and match across Criteria's Predictive Interviewing product line to build the right signal at every stage.

##### Async Video Interview 

Pre-recorded, one-way interviews that let candidates showcase themselves on their schedule, and your team shortlist faster.

***You are here***

##### Real-time Video Interview 

Structured live video interviews with AI transcripts, key moment highlights, summaries, and natural language search.

Learn more

##### AI Interview Agent 

An AI that conducts structured voice interviews 24/7, at unlimited scale, scoring responses instantly with I/O Psych precision.

***Coming July 2026***

## 
Better interviews don't just happen. They're designed.

See how Async Video Interview can transform your top-of-funnel, and deliver the talent signal your hiring decisions deserve 
 

Request a Demo

Structured video interviews are an industry best practice. Incorporate async interviews early in your process for a more complete and objective picture of every candidate's potential.
